dataset_metadata.intended_use: publication-readiness seed corpus for validating schema, coverage, MELM Guard decisions, and Memory OS state resolution before external human labeling
known_limitations: internally authored by the implementation team
not sampled from real customer logs
must not be represented as independent human-labeled data
